page_title: List of Evangelion Pachinko and Pachislot
text:
There are Evangelion themed (pinball gambling machine) and (pachinko-like slot machine) offered at pachinko parlors, video game ports and mobile games.

Ports

Hisshou Pachinko ★ Pachislot Kouryaku Series Vol. 1: CR Neon Genesis Evangelion on PlayStation 2 (October 20, 2005)
Hisshou Pachinko ★ Pachislot Kouryaku Series Vol. 5: CR Neon Genesis Evangelion - Second Impact & Pachislot Neon Genesis Evangelion on PlayStation 2 (June 08, 2006)
Hisshou Pachinko ★ Pachislot Kouryaku Series Vol. 10: CR Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜The Value of a Miracle is...〜 on PlayStation 2 (June 07, 2007)
Hisshou Pachinko ★ Pachislot Kouryaku Series Vol. 11: Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜I'll Give the True Love for You〜 on PlayStation 2 (September 09, 2007) and Nintendo DS (February 21, 2008)
Hisshou Pachinko ★ Pachislot Kouryaku Series Vol. 12: CR Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜The Angels are back again〜 on PlayStation 2 and Nintendo DS. (12 June 2008)
Hisshou Pachinko ★ Pachislot Kouryaku Series Vol. 13: Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜That time has come, now they're waiting for us〜 on PlayStation 2 (18 December 2008) and Nintendo DS. (04 December 2008)
Hisshou Pachinko ★ Pachislot Kouryaku Series Vol. 14: CR Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜The Beginning of the End〜 on PlayStation 2 and Nintendo DS (30 July 2009)
Hisshou Pachinko ★ Pachislot Kouryaku Series Portable Vol. 1: Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜Tamashii no Kiseki〜 on PlayStation Portable (03 June 2010)
Gekiatsu!! Pachige Tamashii CR Evangelion 〜Evangelical of the beginnings〜 on PlayStation Portable and PlayStation 3. (18 November 2010)
Gekiatsu!! Pachige Tamashii VOL 2 Evangelion 〜for your own wish〜 on PlayStation Portable and PlayStation 3. (09 June 2011)
Gekiatsu!! Pachige Tamashii MAX Evangelion "7" X "Seimei no Kodou" on PlayStation 3. (06 September 2012)
EVANGELION ART (Mobile) on Android and iOS (25 February 2014)
